common.noDataHint: No snapshots loaded yet. Run a sync to populate the data.

analytics.title: Market analytics
analytics.subtitle: Pre-built dashboards with automatic insights over the weekly snapshots.
analytics.missingParams: Fill in the parameters to generate the dashboard.
analytics.addWidgetSubtitle: Pick a widget to add to this view. You can then drag it and place it wherever you want.

chartConfig.subtitleMulti: Pick up to {max} metrics. You can change them later with the widget's settings button.
chartConfig.subtitlePart: Pick one metric to split into slices. Only totals are offered: an average cannot be split into parts of a whole.
chartConfig.subtitleScatter: Relate two metrics: each point is a category, placed by its value on each axis. Useful to see whether two indicators move together.
chartConfig.othersHint: The rest is grouped into an “Otros” slice, so they add up to the total.
chartConfig.dualAxis: Use a dual axis (for very different scales)

ventas_kpi.label: Incremental sales
ventas_kpi.desc: This week's sales KPI with its change

add.title: Add widgets
add.body: Use the “Add widget” button to bring the KPIs, charts and rankings you care about into this view.

reorder.title: Reorder them
reorder.body: Drag any widget by its header to move it, and use the bottom-right corner to resize it.

arrange.title: Your way
arrange.body: Your layout is saved automatically for each dashboard. Use “Reset layout” to go back to the original anytime.

adminHome.title: Administration
adminHome.subtitle: System administration tools.
adminHome.categoriesDesc: Group per-country categories under canonical categories.
adminHome.assignRoleDesc: Assign and revoke roles for users.
adminHome.rolesPermsDesc: Create roles and assign permissions to each role.
adminHome.docsDesc: Database diagram and the analytical value of every column.
adminHome.noAccess: You don't have permission to view this page.

dbDocs.title: Database documentation
dbDocs.subtitle: What each table stores, what every piece of data means and what it is useful for in market analysis. Explained in plain language.
dbDocs.introMl: Everything collected from MercadoLibre: the historical product snapshots, categories, sellers, client trackings and the internal tables of the collection process.
dbDocs.introShared: The hand-curated universal categories that make country comparison possible (and, in the future, other marketplaces like Amazon or eBay).

flow.title: How the system works
flow.subtitle: A high-level view of the data's journey, from collection to your dashboard. A conceptual reference, without infrastructure details.

sources.title: Market sources
sources.desc: The public marketplaces (currently MercadoLibre) where listings, prices and sellers live.

collect.title: Automated collection
collect.desc: A scheduled process periodically captures listings, prices, sellers and visits, with no manual work.

normalize.title: Normalization
normalize.desc: Raw data is cleaned and mapped to universal categories, so markets and countries can be compared.

store.title: Analytics history
store.desc: Point-in-time snapshots are stored to track how prices, rankings and discounts evolve.

access.title: Secure access
access.desc: A single entry point validates your session and serves only the information you're allowed to see.

app.title: Analytics dashboard
app.desc: Dashboard, product explorer, comparisons and trackings, ready for decision-making.

dbDocs.mlTitle: How MercadoLibre works under the hood (and how we handle it)
dbDocs.mlSubtitle: Six quirks of how MercadoLibre operates that explain why the data looks the way it does, and the solution we apply in each case.
dbDocs.clickHint: Click a table to expand it and see all its columns; the arrow jumps to its detail.
dbDocs.noAccess: You don't have permission to view this page.

roles.title: Roles & permissions
roles.subtitle: Create roles and assign permissions to each role.
roles.selectRole: Select a role to edit its permissions.
roles.noPermissions: No permissions yet. Create the first one below.
roles.noAccess: You don't have permission to view this page.

admin.title: Category curation
admin.subtitle: Group per-country categories under canonical categories.
admin.noAccess: You don't have permission to view this page.
admin.confirmDelete: Delete this canonical category? Linked ones will be unassigned.

adminSub.title: Subcategory curation
adminSub.subtitle: Group per-country subcategories under canonical subcategories, within each canonical category.
adminSub.pickCanonicalFirst: Pick a canonical category to start curating its subcategories.
adminSub.excludeTitle: Exclude this product from the subcategory (mis-listed by MercadoLibre)
adminSub.includeTitle: Put this product back in the subcategory
adminSub.noPublicIdHint: This product has no stable listing ID, so it can't be excluded individually
adminSub.rowActionHint: Move this product to another canonical subcategory, or exclude it
adminSub.noAccess: You don't have permission to view this page.
adminSub.confirmDelete: Delete this canonical subcategory? Linked ones will be unassigned.

hero.title: Turn <nowrap>e-commerce</nowrap> data into <highlight>decisions that sell</highlight>
hero.subtitle: Price trends, best-seller rankings, discounts and sellers — in a clear, actionable dashboard. Make decisions with data, not hunches.
hero.imageAlt: Executive team reviewing market metrics in a boardroom

decisions.title: Decisions backed by data, not gut feeling
decisions.text: Stop chasing spreadsheets and screenshots. acuanto turns market movements into clear signals so your team can decide with confidence.
decisions.bullet1: Spot price increases and drops before your competition.
decisions.bullet2: See which products enter and exit the best-seller rankings.
decisions.bullet3: Compare categories and sellers across countries in a single view.
decisions.imageAlt: Team prioritizing decisions in front of a planning board

features.title: Everything you need to understand the market
features.subtitle: Built for analysts, sellers and e-commerce teams.
features.priceText: Track how prices evolve per product over time, in local currency and USD.
features.rankingText: See who climbs and who drops in each category's best-sellers.
features.categoryText: Compare average discounts, prices and official-store share.
features.sellerText: Identify the top sellers and the presence of official stores.

tracking.title: Track the specific products that matter to you
tracking.text: Don't want to analyze the whole market? Flag individual products and let acuanto watch their price, ranking and availability for you — with their full history one click away.
tracking.watchText: Flag any listing or catalog product you want to watch and keep it handy in your tracking list.
tracking.alertText: See price increases and drops, stock changes and ranking movements on the products you follow.
tracking.historyText: Review how each tracked product’s price and position evolve over time.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Text: We capture weekly snapshots of best-sellers across the main markets.
howItWorks.step2Text: We add USD prices, discounts, ratings and seller data.
howItWorks.step3Text: You explore trends and insights in an interactive dashboard.

cta.title: Start analyzing the market today
cta.subtitle: Create your free account in seconds.
cta.imageAlt: Analytics dashboard with metrics and charts

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to access your dashboard.
auth.signupSubtitle: Start analyzing the market in minutes.
auth.name: Name
auth.errorGeneric: Couldn't complete the request. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Market analysis
dashboard.subtitle: Explore Latin American markets on the map.
dashboard.mapHint: Click a country to see its analysis
dashboard.compareHint: Select 2 or more countries on the map to compare them.
dashboard.arbitrageHint: Median USD price of each category across markets, ranked by the widest gap.
dashboard.arbitrageEmpty: No comparable categories across these markets.

productDetail.typeCatalogDesc: MercadoLibre catalog page (/p/): one product where several sellers compete for the Buy Box.
productDetail.typeUserProductDesc: Seller product (/up/): a seller's own listing, which may belong to a catalog.
productDetail.typeListingDesc: Classic listing: a single seller's listing, with no Buy Box competition.
productDetail.buyboxNote: Sellers that have won the Buy Box for this product.
productDetail.visitsShareNote: How attributed visits split across winners.

tracked.title: Tracked products
tracked.subtitle: Products you follow; checked on the cadence you choose.
tracked.subscribeError: Could not track the product. Check the URL and try again.
tracked.detectUnknownEcommerce: We don't recognize this store. For now we only track MercadoLibre products.
tracked.detectUnsupportedCountry: This MercadoLibre country isn't available yet. Supported: Argentina, Brazil, Chile, Mexico, Colombia, Peru and Uruguay.
tracked.detectNotAProduct: This link doesn't look like a product. Paste the product page URL.
tracked.cadenceDays: every {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
tracked.pendingHint: First check in progress; it will complete shortly.
tracked.snapshotsNote: One row per checked day; unchanged days carry forward the last snapshot's values.
tracked.notFoundBody: This tracked product doesn't exist or isn't yours.

categories.title: Category analysis
categories.subtitle: Comparison of the categories with the most products.

sellers.title: Seller analysis
sellers.subtitle: Top sellers by presence in the best-sellers.
